description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sdl2-examples that runs on push to any branch except markdown files, on pull requests to any branch except markdown files, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three ubuntu-latest jobs: cmake, make, and two alire jobs with different environments. The cmake job uses a matrix to test different C++ versions with CMake and Ninja. The make job uses a matrix to test various build configurations with Make. The alire jobs set up Alire, install toolchains, and build Ada projects in different environments.
